'''''Noble''''' was a [[Invincible-class Dreadnaught Heavy Cruiser|''Invincible''-class Dreadnaught]] of the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]]. This vessel was significant in that its Human crew all had natural green hair. ''Noble'' was lost centuries before the time of the Empire.
Some people believed that [[Diran Miciluz]], who had green hair, was a descendant of its crew.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" />
